name: Daily / Monthly Sales Report
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can track sales trends over time by accessing the Daily Monthly Sales Report, which compares sales performance across days and months to identify patterns and trends. This time-based analysis helps retail operators understand seasonal fluctuations, identify growth trends, and plan inventory and staffing levels based on historical sales patterns throughout the year."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using the Daily Monthly Sales Report helps retail operators forecast future sales, plan for seasonal peaks, and make informed decisions about inventory investment timing based on proven sales seasonality patterns."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Daily / Monthly Sales Report is designed to give a snapshot of the number of transactions, sales value and GP%, across the days of the week or months of the year to aid you in reflective trend analysis of sales."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To access the Daily / Monthly Sales Report:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Reports > Sales Reports > Daily / Monthly Sales", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select your "}, {"text": "Date Range", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Report Type ", "bold": true}, {"text": "of Daily or Monthly (to review the results as totals for each day or the week or for each month)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Tick "}, {"text": "Inc. GST ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to include tax in the totals"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select your "}, {"text": "Outlet/s", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Search", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powPNEAY.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powPNEAY.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "blobid1 (4).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "View this report in-page, print, or export to Excel."}, {"text": ""}, {"text": ""}, {"text": ""}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/308-daily-monthly-sales-report#Top", "children": [{"text": "Return to Top"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
